knowledge.insight: KVD: 'Punching matted grass setup: 7-10 heavy rod, 8.3:1 high-speed reel (for making more casts, not fighting fish), 1.5oz tungsten weight pegged with bobber stop, 65lb braid, 4/0 hook with Punch Bug. Tungsten's density penetrates dense mats better than lead. The loud impact often attracts fish rather than spooking them.'
